announcements.details: Read the commentary on the readings for the 2nd Sunday of Easter.
announcements.title: Commentary: Divine Mercy Sunday

announcements.details: There will be TWO masses on Sunday, 19th April, 2026. Offertory will be led by the Christian Mothers Association and Sunday borns respectively. Prayer of the faithful will be led by the Lectors.
announcements.title: Mass Schedule: Third Sunday of Easter

announcements.details: Admissions for 2026/2027 academic year at Corpus Christi SHS, are open. Programmes offered are: Business, Science, General Arts, and Home Economics. Th entrance exams takes place on 16th and 23rd May. Fee: GHS 250. Kindly see either of the church secretaries to register.
announcements.title: Corpus Christi SHS Admissions

announcements.details: Catechesis for the Sacraments is ongoing. Baptism and First Communion classes for children aged 10 and above are held on Saturdays at 3:00pm. Confirmation classes are for those aged 15 and above, while adult classes take place on Sundays after the first Mass. Interested persons should register with the catechists, at the parish office.
announcements.title: Chatechism Classes

announcements.details: All parishioners who want to purchase the church cloth should kindly register with the church secretary within the week at the church office.
announcements.title: Church Cloth Sales

announcements.details: The St Bakhita Marriage School re-opens on Sunday 19th April, 2026. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest.
announcements.title: Marriage School

announcements.details: Effective January 2026, Stole fees for the celebration of the sacraments and church dues have been reviewed.
announcements.title: Revision of Stole Fees and Church Dues

masses.subtitle: First mass at 7:00am, Second mass at 9:00am
masses.title: Third Sunday of Easter

sacraments.subtitle: First Saturday of every month, after Grotto Mass

sacraments.subtitle: The St Bakhita Marriage School will re-open soon. Prospective couples who wish to have their marriages solemnised from the later part of 2026 onwards may collect the registration forms from the office of the Parish Priest.
